client_logo.title: Northwind Logistics logo
client_logo.description: Fictional demo brand from the Desiderio styleguide.

summary:
Northwind relaunched 14 country sites on one Agency plan (€149/month, unlimited projects): all 255 ready-made elements, a theme preset per market on a shared install, and quarterly editor onboarding from the maintainers.
Not a single custom content type was written.

image.title: Desiderio dashboard page in the Forest preset
image.alternative: Dashboard-style Desiderio frontend page rendered in the Forest theme preset.
image.description: Screenshot of a Desiderio frontend page from the seeded styleguide.
